# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Jenkins Pipeline that downloads build artifacts from external URLs provided as parameters and deploys them to production servers. This allows us to deploy pre-built artifacts from different sources (S3, Artifactory, HTTP servers) without rebuilding.
# Category: cicd_security

pipeline {
    agent any

    options {
        timestamps()
        disableConcurrentBuilds()
        buildDiscarder(logRotator(numToKeepStr: '20', daysToKeepStr: '30'))
    }

    parameters {
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_URL', defaultValue: '', description: 'External URL to the pre-built artifact (S3, Artifactory, HTTP/HTTPS, etc.)')
        string(name: 'ARTIFACT_NAME', defaultValue: 'artifact.zip', description: 'Local filename to save the downloaded artifact as')
        choice(name: 'DEPLOY_TARGET', choices: ['prod', 'prod-east', 'prod-west'], description: 'Production deployment target')
        booleanParam(name: 'DEPLOY_AFTER_DOWNLOAD', defaultValue: true, description: 'Deploy artifact after successful download')
        string(name: 'REMOTE_DIR', defaultValue: '/opt/app/releases', description: 'Remote directory to deploy the artifact into')
        string(name: 'APP_SERVICE', defaultValue: 'myapp', description: 'Service name to restart after deployment')
    }

    environment {
        DOWNLOAD_DIR = "${WORKSPACE}/downloaded"
    }

    stages {
        stage('Validate Parameters') {
            steps {
                script {
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_URL?.trim()) {
                        error('ARTIFACT_URL is required')
                    }
                    if (!params.ARTIFACT_NAME?.trim()) {
                        error('ARTIFACT_NAME is required')
                    }
                    if (!params.REMOTE_DIR?.trim()) {
                        error('REMOTE_DIR is required')
                    }
                    if (!params.APP_SERVICE?.trim()) {
                        error('APP_SERVICE is required')
                    }
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Prepare Workspace') {
            steps {
                sh '''
                    set -e
                    rm -rf "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}"
                    mkdir -p "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}"
                '''
            }
        }

        stage('Download Artifact') {
            steps {
                script {
                    def artifactPath = "${env.DOWNLOAD_DIR}/${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}"
                    env.DOWNLOADED_ARTIFACT = artifactPath

                    sh """
                        set -euo pipefail
                        echo "Downloading artifact from: ${params.ARTIFACT_URL}"
                        curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-delay 2 --connect-timeout 10 --max-time 3600 \\
                            -o '${artifactPath}' '${params.ARTIFACT_URL}'
                        ls -lh '${artifactPath}'
                    """
                }
            }
        }

        stage('Inspect Artifact') {
            steps {
                sh '''
                    set -e
                    file "${DOWNLOADED_ARTIFACT}" || true
                    sha256sum "${DOWNLOADED_ARTIFACT}" || true
                '''
            }
        }

        stage('Deploy to Production') {
            when {
                expression { return params.DEPLOY_AFTER_DOWNLOAD }
            }
            steps {
                script {
                    def targetHosts = []
                    switch (params.DEPLOY_TARGET) {
                        case 'prod':
                            targetHosts = ['prod-01.example.com', 'prod-02.example.com']
                            break
                        case 'prod-east':
                            targetHosts = ['prod-east-01.example.com', 'prod-east-02.example.com']
                            break
                        case 'prod-west':
                            targetHosts = ['prod-west-01.example.com', 'prod-west-02.example.com']
                            break
                        default:
                            error("Unknown deploy target: ${params.DEPLOY_TARGET}")
                    }

                    withCredentials([sshUserPrivateKey(credentialsId: 'prod-ssh-key', keyFileVariable: 'SSH_KEY', usernameVariable: 'SSH_USER')]) {
                        for (host in targetHosts) {
                            sh """
                                set -euo pipefail
                                echo "Deploying to ${host}"
                                ssh -i '${SSH_KEY}' -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${SSH_USER}@${host}' 'mkdir -p "${params.REMOTE_DIR}"'
                                scp -i '${SSH_KEY}' -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${env.DOWNLOADED_ARTIFACT}' '${SSH_USER}@${host}:${params.REMOTE_DIR}/'
                                ssh -i '${SSH_KEY}' -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no '${SSH_USER}@${host}' '
                                    set -e
                                    cd "${params.REMOTE_DIR}"
                                    ls -lh "${params.ARTIFACT_NAME}" || true
                                    sudo systemctl restart "${params.APP_SERVICE}"
                                    sudo systemctl status --no-pager --full "${params.APP_SERVICE}" || true
                                '
                            """
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    post {
        success {
            echo "Artifact download and deployment completed successfully."
        }
        failure {
            echo "Pipeline failed."
        }
        cleanup {
            sh '''
                set +e
                rm -rf "${DOWNLOAD_DIR}"
            '''
        }
    }
}
